title: AI-UI component type definitions
purpose: Provides type definitions for AI-UI components including cards, sections, columns, accordions, alerts, and UI components with actions.
module_context: Exports multiple interface type definitions for AI-UI component props and structure including CommonProps, CardProps, SectionProps, ColumnsProps, AccordionProps, AlertProps, UIComponent, and UIAction.

steps.content: Define common properties shared across AI-UI components.
Include optional className for CSS styling.
Include optional style for inline CSS properties.
Include optional hidden flag for component visibility.
Define properties for card components extending common props.
Include optional title for card header.
Include optional subtitle for card header.
Include optional footer text.
Include optional collapsible flag.
Include optional collapsed state.
Include optional border color.
Include optional background color.
Include optional elevation level.
Define properties for section components extending common props.
Include optional heading text.
Include optional description text.
Include optional heading level from 1 to 6.
Include optional divider flag.
Include optional collapsible flag.
Include optional collapsed state.
Define properties for column components extending common props.
Include required columns count.
Include optional gap between columns.
Include optional responsive flag.
Include optional breakpoints for mobile, tablet, and desktop.
Include optional alignment for columns.
Define properties for accordion components extending common props.
Include required sections array with id, title, and content.
Include optional allowMultiple flag for multiple open sections.
Include optional variant for accordion styling.
Define properties for alert components extending common props.
Include required type for alert severity.
Include optional title for alert header.
Include optional message text.
Include optional dismissible flag.
Include optional icon identifier.
Include optional actions array with id and label.
Include optional persistent flag.
Define structure for UI component objects.
Include required type identifier.
Include required props object for component properties.
Include optional children array of nested components.
Include optional actions array of component actions.
Define structure for UI action objects.
Include required id identifier.
Include required label text.
Include optional primary flag for primary action styling.
Include optional destructive flag for destructive action styling.
Include optional alignment for action placement.
